description:
Implement `hx-meter` (T3 tier) — 2/6 libraries ship this. Scalar measurement within a known range (e.g., disk usage, score).

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-meter/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-meter.ts`, `hx-meter.styles.ts`, `hx-meter.stories.ts`, `hx-meter.test.ts`

**Props:** `value` (number), `min` (default 0), `max` (default 100), `low` (number — threshold below which = warning), `high` (number — threshold above which = warning), `optimum` (number — optimal value), `label` (string)

**Slots:** `label` (visible label above meter)

**CSS Parts:** `base` (track), `indicator` (filled bar), `label`

**ARIA:** Use the native `<meter>` element inside shadow root for semantics (`value`, `min`, `max`, `low`, `high`, `optimum` attributes). Or `role="meter"` with `aria-valuenow`, `aria-valuemin`, `aria-valuemax`, `aria-label`.

**Color logic:** Indicator color changes based on value vs low/high/optimum thresholds — use `--hx-*` tokens for success/warning/danger colors.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests (value ranges, threshold colors), axe-core zero violations, Storybook with various ranges, bundle < 2KB.

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-meter — T3 Meter/Gauge Component
